name: Veg Tofu Triangles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firm tofu (or fat free ricotta cheese)
1/2 cup fat free cheddar or mozzarella cheese, grated (optional)
4 sheets of frozen puff pastry (or 8 sheets frozen phyllo pastry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the carrot, zucchini, and spinach in a food processor.
2. Process the firm tofu until crumbly.
3. Mix the grated vegetables, processed tofu, cheese (if using), herbs, and spices in a bowl.
4. Line a baking tray with greaseproof paper or lightly spray with oil.
5. Cut each pastry sheet into 4 squares.
6. Place about 1 heaping tablespoon (or as much as will fit) of the vegetable mixture onto each square.
7. Fold the pastry into a triangle shape, sealing with beaten egg white or water.
8. Place each triangle onto the baking tray.
9. Repeat until all ingredients are used up or you run out of pastry.
10. Poke a couple of holes in the top of each triangle with a knife.
11. Optionally, brush the tops of the triangles with egg white and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
12. Bake at 180 degrees Celsius (350 degrees Fahrenheit) for about 20 minutes.
13. Serve with mashed potatoes!
